prompt:
Take the provided reference image and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY — same person composition (chin to mid-torso, plain t-shirt, exposed deltoid on viewer's right), same balloon-shaped device positioned on the deltoid at the same overall location as in the reference, same flush red button with center black dot, same vial hanging down from the device's bottom neck protrusion, same vial filled halfway with red blood, same line-art style on pure white background, same line weight. DO NOT change the person, the framing, the device design, the device's overall location on the deltoid, the red button, the vial, the blood, the line weight, or the style.

TWO MODIFICATIONS:

1) LIFT ONE SIDE OF THE DEVICE OFF THE SHOULDER VISIBLY — the device is RIGID and pivots at one edge. The LEFT side of the device (closer to the body / chest / inner edge) remains FULLY IN CONTACT with the deltoid skin. The RIGHT side of the device (the outer edge, closer to the outer arm) is CLEARLY LIFTED UP off the skin — show a CLEARLY VISIBLE GAP (roughly the height of the device's neck protrusion) between the lifted right edge of the device's underside and the deltoid surface beneath it. The device is rigidly tilted upward on the right side, like a hinged door swinging open. The viewer can clearly see (a) the device's bottom underside on the lifted side (since it's angled toward the viewer), and (b) the deltoid skin visible UNDER the lifted edge (the gap is unmistakable). The hand grips the lifted right edge of the device firmly, holding it up.

2) ARROW POINTING AWAY FROM SHOULDER — replace the current arrow with a single clean BLACK arrow that originates near the lifted edge and points clearly UP and AWAY from the shoulder skin (toward the upper-LEFT of the frame, away from the deltoid). The arrow's tail near the device, arrowhead toward the upper-left edge of the frame. Slim straight or slightly diagonal arrow with clean arrowhead. Conveys 'continue peeling the device away in this direction'.

Do not modify anything else — no changes to the person, the device design (still rigid balloon shape), the still-attached LEFT edge, the red button, the vial, the blood, the line weight, the background, or the style. Pure black line-art on white with TWO REDS (flush red button + red blood). No frame, no border around the canvas, no labels.
